info.name: HGN IAM — AuthZ Org Testing
info.description:
Minimal AuthN + AuthZ collection aligned with V2/V3/V4 seeds.

Run order:
1) 00 - Core Users Login
2) 01 - Core Admin Sanity
3) Organization folders (02+)

Pattern:
- Each organization folder logs in its own admin + secondary user and uses those tokens only in that folder.

item.name: Authorize - Rescue Centre Admin CAN rescue.mission.create
Authorize - Rescue Company Admin CAN rescue.mission.create
Authorize - Service Provider Admin CAN document.template.create
Authorize - Service Provider Operator CANNOT document.template.create
